_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to provide instruction on technical cyber capabilities, tools, and methods.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data and AI requirements, evaluating trade-offs between performance, maintainability, team capability, ecosystem maturity, and cost.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.525), OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.490).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.463). Shared vocabulary: [ability, technical, tools]. DCWF-only terms [capabilities, cyber, instruction, methods, provide] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, appropriate, capability, cost, data, ecosystem] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.916, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:64.6%, C:35.4%). No dominant classification for "Ability to provide instruction on technical cyber capabilities, tools, and metho" vs "Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.583 > STS 0.463 (gap +0.120). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability, technical, tools] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.7%. Shared tokens: [ability, technical, tools]. DCWF-only: [capabilities, cyber, instruction, methods, provide]. WIDAI-only: [ai, appropriate, capability, cost, data, ecosystem].

signals.detail: STS 0.463 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
